review_text: Very friendly and helpful staff. Well kept grounds. Clean easy access amenities, great pool, picnic park and facilities. Several BBQ areas and picnic tables. Own jetty. Rv, caravan and camp sites. Relaxed family friendly park. Quiet in the evenings. Highly recommend this reasonably priced holiday park.

Camping at Paradise palms was very nice. Park and Amenities were clean.
Pool was so nice to cool off and sit around. Staff friendly and had a nice stay.
Thank you

Where do I start! Wouldn’t recommend, even to my enemies seems like a good spot.

The room was filthy, the bed felt like it had a 20mm yoga mat pretending to be a mattress, and sleeping was basically an extreme sport.

There appear to be a large number of permanent residents who treat the place less like accommodation and more like a live-action episode of Cops.

Staff were unbelievably rude, unhelpful, and clearly hate both their jobs and humanity.

During my stay I witnessed:
•	Someone take a dump on the barbecue
•	Multiple fights
•	Grown men urinating in public
•	And what can only be described as a drunken sword fight (no swords, just anatomy)

If you’re looking for somewhere quiet, clean, and safe, this is not it.
If you’re researching locations for a dystopian movie set, congratulations… you’ve found it.

Save your money. Save your sanity. Stay literally anywhere else.

This Van park really needs to be cleaned

My experience there was ok if you are at the front with your own van, but it would be too cramped further back.

Great water frontage , and view
Cabin was clean and spacious. Host was very nice and gave some local knowledge and restaurant recommendations. Very very pleasant stay.
Got over charged no swimming pool on school holidays and got told 2 pm checkout but took 75 dollars from my for cleaning and late check-out..and had 200 pn but other people paid 400 pw?????rude

Paradise Palms in Carey Bay was a terrible experience. I thought I would take my 8 yr old grandson away for the weekend we left that night after 5 hours of being there.
The cabin we stayed in (cabin 10)
Was very smelly we had Ants and spiders.
and very run down. Nothing like the website .
Contacted management the next morning as we left pm that night.
I found her rude and unprofessional she wouldn’t give me her name.
She would not refund or try and resolve this problem except to not welcome me into Edward’s family parks anymore !
I thought at least for one night as a courtesy to what we endured not even
So people beware
Look at the place before you book if you can.
We stayed as passing through and the caulbin was tidy, friendly and flexible staff, reasonable price.
Hey hey terrible customer service for a regular have to get a new idea cause yours guys sucks lol

Stay away, way too overpriced, rooms are old, appliances and furniture old, and do not get me started with the beds. I reckon it is not worth more than
50$ a night.

We obviously picked the wrong time to be at this park after rain and the site we were given was a quagmire and if your van is over about 20 ft it will be very tight, probably not worth the fees they are charging. We found it easier and better value to go to a Showground for $22.00 a night and not a quagmire.
A bit old fashioned, but well maintained and clean. On top of that a beautiful location directly on the lake.

Great management
Very helpful, gives a comfortable vibe

We had an absolutely wonderful stay at Paradise Palms! The location is absolutely stunning and our cabin overlooked the beautiful waterfront, complete with palm trees, lush greenery, and a sparkling pool. Everything was immaculately clean and well maintained.
The team went above and beyond to accommodate us when they were fully booked, and their communication was outstanding from start to finish. It felt like we were truly taken care of.
Highly recommend this peaceful, welcoming getaway we couldn’t have asked for a better experience! Thank you, Paradise Palms, for making our stay unforgettable. 🌴🏝️
Was good but hard to find

Booked a Lake view cabin with almost no views of the lake.
Bbqs dont work and dirty. Curtains torn and dirty.
Old food in drawers.
Cabin is generally in poor condition.
Bed comfy and clean.
Location is amazing.

Cabin was very outdated.
Parking was confusing.
Beds were comfy and clean.
Stove was unreliable.
Ripped curtains and dirty blinds.
Pool was lovely but no shade and not many lounge chairs.
Location is perfect for kayaking, fishing, sunsets and view.

I like the park and lived in the area for 20 years so still consider it a great location. We stayed at the park 2 years ago and has gone slightly backwards. Needs a little TLC around the park and on sites. Natives were a bit restless this time but are easy to get along with if you say G'day. Amenities work fine and would probably stay again.
The place was alright but run down when we first got to our room there was a old cookie rapper with crumbs  on the spare linin sheet

We had a great experience staying at Paradise Palms it was our first time staying in this area with our caravan . We had a great water view, very clean swimming pool owners were  delightful.Thank you Garry and Julie we will be back as we have family in the area .
Cheers
Amanda& David Bray

Very small caravan sites. Barely enough room to park a car in-front of the caravan.
Showers intermittently cold.

Owner is very rude made my 10 yr old daughter cry on our first day because she was drawing on the road with chalk and then when she got excited about Santa comming he walked up and told us to be quiet she was only excited about Santa comming not recommended for family’s and also never no soap in ladies toilets and also ran low on toilet paper never staying here again
Noisy tenants with no respect for visitors. Or anyone. Poor management service when it comes to rules.

I recently had to cancel my booking for accommodation at Paradise Palms due to work commitments. The day that I notified them of the cancellation the refund was back in my account without even asking the question. This means a lot! I'll be sure to stay here next time I'm in the area! Many thanks!
Beautiful spot
The management was lovely & friendly. The cabins we booked were very dated & unfortunately smelt badly of cigarettes.
Past couple months there s
Rather small spaces for caravan of medium size. Moving facility available to move van into position. Sites near the water but close neighbours bit much...and noisy.

I had a lovely stay at this hotel, unfortunately I was awoke to a man in a costume with a big burger on his head hitting my chairs and bed with a rainbow unicorn pickaxe. He also has a pump action shot gun on him

Paradise Palms sadly is not Paradise. It gets one star for clean bathrooms and another for being in a lovely location.
The caravan sites are tiny and our “water view” site was actually the backs of cabins. No water from the site to be seen. Fortunately it’s a short walk to the lake with (limited) seating.
The BBQ’s were filthy and couldn’t be used with tubs of cigarette butts floating in water right nearby.
The check in area is dilapidated and rotting and very clearly hadn’t seen a broom or a duster since the dinosaurs roamed.
Check in ridiculously closes at 12noon on weekends and management/owners were nowhere to be seen. Communication was via a speaker and (eventually) text message.
Cabin stay on the water is probably nice.
It’s unlikely we’d stay here again which is a shame as the location is nice.
Amazing stay here. Really friendly staff and great facilities
Neat cabin, great managers
Management and employees are poor and rude, he ripped us off and sent us to the wrong plot. Wouldn't recommend coming here
Great location however lacks kitchen facilities. The managers are very friendly

Great hospitality/ hosts
Very clean
Very friendly
Incredibly well priced!
I would definitely recommend this holiday park  for anyone.
Thankyou Julie and Darren
Very accommodating, friendly prompt service, it was a great seaside spot to wake up at! 🌅😍

We needed a place in a hurry, due to a funeral.
They couldn’t have been more helpful or more amazing, accomodating multiple bookings for multiple people.

undeniably the most amazing couple who run the place, they helped us more than you could ever believe as we were struggling to stay on our feet while running a marathon for charity. Paradise Palms was one of our many stops on the way but they gave us unforgettable experience 100% recommend a stay there.

Great location Nice view
Reasonable amenities
Tidy park
Lovely clean cabins, Julie and Darren are great hosts and very friendly . Very peaceful park and magnificent views of the lake. I will come back here again.
Very helpful and friendly management and staff.
